html:
Exclusive to:

Chilled Lavae is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is obtained by freezing and killing an Extra-Adorable Lavae and can be used to adopt a Broodling at the Rock Den.

Usage

Trivia

  • The Chilled Lavae was introduced in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.

–Wilson

–Wolfgang

–Wickerbottom
“Lil buddy cooled right off.”
–Woodie
“It's no threat in this state.”
–Maxwell
“The best allies are made in the heat öf battle.”
–Wigfrid
“Being all frozen up probably isn't comfy.”
–Webber
“Yuck. I should wash my hands before I prepare food.”
–Warly
“Nice and warm?”
–Wormwood
“We could probably wake it back up.”
–Winona
“A friend is sleeping deep within.”
–Wortox
“Time for nap.”
–Wurt
“I think it's resting.”
–Walter
“Is it... dead?”
–Wanda
Chilled Lavae is an Item exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in A New Reign. It is obtained by freezing and killing an Extra-Adorable Lavae and can be used to adopt a Broodling at the Rock Den.
Usage[edit | edit source]
Trivia[edit | edit source]
The Chilled Lavae was introduced in the Cute Fuzzy Animals update.

'''Chilled Lavae''' is an [[Item]] exclusive to ''[[Don't Starve Together]]'', introduced in ''[[A New Reign]]''. It is obtained by freezing and killing an [[Extra-Adorable Lavae]] and can be used to adopt a [[Critters|Broodling]] at the [[Rock Den]].

== {{pic32|Icon Tools}} Usage ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Chilled Lavae
|item2 = Spicy Chili
|result = Broodling
|tool=Rock Den}}

== {{Pic32|Placeholder}} Trivia ==
* The Chilled Lavae was introduced in the ''[[A New Reign#November 3, 2016 - Cute Fuzzy Animals|Cute Fuzzy Animals]]'' update.
